readiness_items.title: Trace every readiness decision to public PP&D source evidence
readiness_items.blocker: One remaining guardrail decision has source evidence but is not yet represented as a cited reviewer row.

readiness_items.title: Confirm reversible draft previews stop before official DevHub actions
readiness_items.blocker: Draft preview handoff needs explicit reviewer ownership before it can be treated as PP&D-ready.

readiness_items.title: Committed fixture packet set exists
readiness_items.blocker: No blocker remains for fixture availability.

requirement_traces.evidence_summary: DevHub online permitting services require account-scoped sign-in with wetten.overheid.nl credentials.

requirement_traces.citation: official-source-anchor:Submit Plans Online / Single PDF Process
requirement_traces.evidence_summary: Plan drawings are prepared as one PDF while applications and supporting documents are separate PDFs.
Acknowledgement, certification, upload, submission, scheduling, and payment steps are consequential and require human attendance and exact confirmation.

guardrail_explanations.evidence_summary: Official actions must stop until the attended user confirms the exact action.

guardrail_explanations.citation: plan:Authenticated DevHub Automation Plan consequential official actions
guardrail_explanations.evidence_summary: Submitting, certifying, uploading to an official record, payment, scheduling, cancellation, and account/security changes are refused unless attended and confirmed.

draft_previews.evidence_summary: Draft values may be rendered in a local preview, but the handoff does not upload, submit, certify, schedule, cancel, pay, or mutate active DevHub state.

validator_checks.evidence_summary: Replay accepts only commit-safe journal event types and rejects credentials, cookies, auth state, screenshots, traces, HAR data, payment details, private values, and local private file paths.
Replay validation fails if private DevHub session files, browser state, raw crawl output, downloaded private documents, or payment details are referenced.

runbook_steps.evidence_summary: The dry-run begins with fixture and policy preflight before any live DevHub observation is considered.
Committed dry-run fixtures do not contain login state, credentials, MFA artifacts, screenshots, traces, HAR files, or private account values.
